figures.caption: Table 3: Results (%) on 500 paired questions per dataset. “Covered” = gold answer present in context (count in parentheses). Bold = best per column. GW = graph-walk compression. F1/EM use SQuAD normalization; 8B outputs are LLM-normalized to short answers (§4).

Table 11: LightRAG generality experiment (%) on 500 paired questions per dataset. “Covered” = gold answer present in LightRAG context (count in parentheses). Bold = best per model group. GW = graph-walk compression. F1/EM use SQuAD normalization; 8B outputs are LLM-normalized to short answers (§4).
